arts.ttl: Risk-taking and high-pressing: Iraola's Bournemouth transformation explained
arts.sum: This time last season, Bournemouth sat 19th in the Premier League without a win in seven games. It is a measure of how far they have come under Andoni Iraola that, despite being five points and six places better off, the prevailing mood is one of frustration.

arts.ttl: When Mikel Arteta can unleash dream Arsenal midfield amid huge injury update - Tom Canton
arts.sum: Arteta was later pressed by a different reporter on whether in the next seven games, the gap between now and the next international break, he could feature. Speaking ahead of the game against Bournemouth this coming weekend he said: “I think he’s not going to be fit for this game.

arts.ttl: 'A different story': Chris Sutton makes bold result prediction for Bournemouth v Arsenal clash tomorrow
arts.sum: Arsenal will be raring to go on their return to Premier League action following the international break, with a trip to Bournemouth on the cards....

arts.ttl: Tottenham warn supporters not to sing shocking Mikel Arteta chant during West Ham game as club threaten 'strongest possible action' in email to season ticket holders
arts.sum: Spurs will be back in action on Saturday when they take on West Ham in a London derby following the international break, but supporters have been messaged prior to the match.

arts.ttl: Photo: Arteta calls teenage speedster up to Arsenal training pre-Cherries, his 'directness causes problems for opponents'
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has been putting his players through their paces ahead of their return to Premier League action this weekend. The Gunners remain...

arts.ttl: Team News: Bournemouth vs. Arsenal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Bournemouth and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta leaves door open to managing England following Thomas Tuchel appointment
arts.sum: Arsenal head coach Mikel Arteta discusses the possibility of managing England in the future following the appointment of Thomas Tuchel earlier this week.

arts.ttl: Arteta has perfect Arsenal blueprint to solve injury crisis for Bournemouth
arts.sum: Given the injury issues in his squad, Arteta was asked for updates on a number of stars with a mixture of positive and negative news delivered. Arteta was also on hand to offer the latest on Martinelli, Odegaard and Havertz with it sounding far less likely that trio make the game in comparison to the other four.

arts.ttl: What really happened when Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers met Kieran Tierney as boss spills the beans on Arsenal star chat
arts.sum: The rumour mill has shifted up a gear after the duo were snapped together in London

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals key area Arsenal are 'struggling' with injuries
arts.sum: MIkel Arteta has revealed full-backs Ben White, Jurrien Timber and Oleksandr Zinchenko are all close to returning to full fitness but admitted Arsenal are "struggling" for numbers ahead of their trip to Bournemouth on Saturday. Speaking in his press conference on Friday, Arteta revealed: "They [White, Timber and Zinchenko] are quite close the three of them.
